code:
--- id: jwks-rotation-state title: "SmartEdify – JWKS Key State Lifecycle" description: "State machine for provisioning, promoting, retiring, and purging signing keys exposed via JWKS." updated: 2025-02-14 tags: [FinTech_PaymentGateway] --- stateDiagram-v2 [FinTech_FraudDetection] --> Provisioning Provisioning --> Current: Activated Current --> Retiring: Key Rotation Initiated Retiring --> Deprecated: Grace Window Expired Deprecated --> Purge: TTL / Manual Cleanup Purge --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway] note right of Provisioning: Generate key pair
Store kid + created_at note right of Current: Signs new tokens
JWKS exposes kid note right of Retiring: Valid for verification only
New tokens use CURRENT note right of Deprecated: Should not verify (FinTech_LedgerService) note right of Purge: Row deletion or archive

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要给支付网关的JWKS密钥生命周期画个状态图。核心流程是：密钥从Provisioning开始，激活后进入Current状态，轮换时先到Retiring， grace window结束后变成Deprecated，最后Purge掉。起点是FraudDetection触发，终点是PaymentGateway消费。
确认一下状态流转：Provisioning到Current是'Activated'，Current到Retiring是'Key Rotation Initiated'，Retiring到Deprecated是'Grace Window Expired'，Deprecated到Purge是'TTL / Manual Cleanup'。另外，LedgerService在哪个环节介入？
对的，流转关系没错。LedgerService主要是在Deprecated阶段要注意——这时候密钥不应该再用于验证了，我们在Deprecated的note里标注一下。每个状态右侧都加上note说明具体行为。
好的，我先把主干画出来：起点FinTech_FraudDetection指向Provisioning，然后Provisioning→Current→Retiring→Deprecated→Purge，最后Purge指向FinTech_PaymentGateway。五个状态节点都齐了。
note内容我细化一下：Provisioning是生成密钥对并存储kid和created_at；Current是签发新token，JWKS暴露kid；Retiring只能用于验签，新token用CURRENT的密钥；Deprecated标注LedgerService不应再验证；Purge是行删除或归档。
收到，五个note都放到各状态右侧。标题用'SmartEdify – JWKS Key State Lifecycle'，描述写'State machine for provisioning, promoting, retiring, and purging signing keys exposed via JWKS.'，标签加上FinTech_PaymentGateway。这样完整了吗？
等等，Retiring的note描述要调整一下——不是'只能用于验签'，应该是'Valid for verification only'，并且强调'New tokens use CURRENT'，这样和Current状态形成明确对比。
已修正，Retiring的note现在写'Valid for verification only'和'New tokens use CURRENT'。整个状态图检查完毕，所有流转、note、起终点都对应上了。
